requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — GSO / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——GSO / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——GSO / IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the Kuwaiti market are regulated through the Public Authority for Industry (PAI) under the mandatory Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (KUCAS). Kuwait adopts GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) standards, which in turn adopt the IEC 62133 series — IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications). Conformity is demonstrated by a recognised test report to GSO/IEC 62133 supporting a KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report and, where the product is in a regulated category, a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity. IEC 62133-2 covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical limits. Kuwait operates a 240 V / 50 Hz grid (same 50 Hz frequency as China, different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V), which the product and any charger must tolerate.
summary.zh: 投放科威特市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，由公共工业管理局（PAI）依据强制性的科威特合格保证计划（KUCAS）管理。科威特采纳GSO（海湾标准化组织）标准，而GSO标准采纳IEC 62133系列——锂系统适用IEC 62133-2（便携式应用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）。合格评定通过依据GSO/IEC 62133出具的认可检测报告来证明，用以支持KUCAS技术评估报告；若产品属受管类别，还须逐批合格证书。IEC 62133-2涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学限值。科威特电网为240 V / 50 Hz（频率与中国同为50 Hz，标称电压与中国220/380 V不同），产品及任何充电器须能耐受。
summary.zht: 投放科威特市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，由公共工業管理局（PAI）依據強制性的科威特合格保證計劃（KUCAS）管理。科威特採納GSO（海灣標準化組織）標準，而GSO標準採納IEC 62133系列——鋰系統適用IEC 62133-2（便攜式應用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）。合格評定透過依據GSO/IEC 62133出具的認可檢測報告來證明，用以支持KUCAS技術評估報告；若產品屬受管類別，還須逐批合格證書。IEC 62133-2涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學限值。科威特電網為240 V / 50 Hz（頻率與中國同為50 Hz，標稱電壓與中國220/380 V不同），產品及任何充電器須能耐受。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62133-2 (adopted) — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems
Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (KUCAS) — Public Authority for Industry (PAI), Technical Evaluation Report and per-shipment Certificate of Conformity
IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 — base international standard adopted by GSO

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A Chinese CNAS-accredited GB 31241 report is NOT automatically accepted under KUCAS; PAI/GSO conformity relies on a recognised GSO/IEC 62133 test report. However, because GSO adopts IEC 62133 directly, an IEC 62133-2 (CB Scheme) report a Chinese exporter already holds is often a more directly usable basis for KUCAS than a GB 31241 report.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可的GB 31241报告在KUCAS下不被自动接受；PAI/GSO合格评定依据认可的GSO/IEC 62133检测报告。但由于GSO直接采纳IEC 62133，中国出口商已持有的IEC 62133-2（CB体系）报告，往往比GB 31241报告更可直接用作KUCAS的依据。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可的GB 31241報告在KUCAS下不被自動接受；PAI/GSO合格評定依據認可的GSO/IEC 62133檢測報告。但由於GSO直接採納IEC 62133，中國出口商已持有的IEC 62133-2（CB體系）報告，往往比GB 31241報告更可直接用作KUCAS的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Kuwait accepts conformity to GSO/IEC 62133 under KUCAS, not GB 31241. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) a GB 31241 report does not by itself satisfy KUCAS — a recognised GSO/IEC 62133-2 test report is needed, ideally via the IEC CB Scheme which most accredited labs can issue; (2) KUCAS requires a Technical Evaluation Report and, for regulated categories, a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity issued before the goods reach Kuwaiti ports (Shuwaikh, Shuaiba) — an ongoing per-consignment obligation absent in Chinese domestic sales; (3) the product and any included charger must be rated for Kuwait's 240 V / 50 Hz supply; (4) Arabic/English product and capacity labelling per GSO practice. Engineering content of GB 31241 may overlap heavily with IEC 62133-2, reducing re-test scope, but the conformity documentation and certificate route differ.
gap.zh: 科威特在KUCAS下接受符合GSO/IEC 62133的合格评定，而非GB 31241。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）GB 31241报告本身不能满足KUCAS——须有认可的GSO/IEC 62133-2检测报告，最好通过多数认可实验室可出具的IEC CB体系；（2）KUCAS要求技术评估报告，且受管类别须在货物抵达科威特港口（舒维赫、舒艾巴）前取得逐批合格证书——这是中国国内销售所没有的持续逐批义务；（3）产品及随附充电器须按科威特240 V / 50 Hz供电额定；（4）按GSO惯例提供阿拉伯文/英文产品及容量标签。GB 31241与IEC 62133-2的工程内容可能高度重叠，可减少重测范围，但合格评定文件及证书路径不同。
gap.zht: 科威特在KUCAS下接受符合GSO/IEC 62133的合格評定，而非GB 31241。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）GB 31241報告本身不能滿足KUCAS——須有認可的GSO/IEC 62133-2檢測報告，最好透過多數認可實驗室可出具的IEC CB體系；（2）KUCAS要求技術評估報告，且受管類別須在貨物抵達科威特港口（舒維赫、舒艾巴）前取得逐批合格證書——這是中國國內銷售所沒有的持續逐批義務；（3）產品及隨附充電器須按科威特240 V / 50 Hz供電額定；（4）按GSO慣例提供阿拉伯文/英文產品及容量標籤。GB 31241與IEC 62133-2的工程內容可能高度重疊，可減少重測範圍，但合格評定文件及證書路徑不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GSO/IEC 62133-2 safety conformity under the KUCAS scheme (PAI) is required before placement on the Kuwaiti market; Technical Evaluation Report plus per-shipment Certificate of Conformity apply for regulated categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kuwait requires lithium cell and pack safety conformity to GSO/IEC 62133-2 under the PAI-administered KUCAS scheme, evidenced by a recognised test report supporting a Technical Evaluation Report and, for regulated categories, a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy KUCAS, but an IEC 62133-2 CB Scheme report is a directly usable basis because GSO adopts IEC 62133. The product and charger must suit Kuwait's 240 V / 50 Hz supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科威特要求锂电芯及电池组安全合格评定符合GSO/IEC 62133-2，并在PAI实施的KUCAS计划下，以认可检测报告支持技术评估报告；受管类别还须逐批合格证书。中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足KUCAS，但因GSO采纳IEC 62133，IEC 62133-2的CB体系报告可直接用作依据。产品及充电器须适配科威特240 V / 50 Hz供电。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科威特要求鋰電芯及電池組安全合格評定符合GSO/IEC 62133-2，並在PAI實施的KUCAS計劃下，以認可檢測報告支持技術評估報告；受管類別還須逐批合格證書。中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足KUCAS，但因GSO採納IEC 62133，IEC 62133-2的CB體系報告可直接用作依據。產品及充電器須適配科威特240 V / 50 Hz供電。

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI), State of Kuwait — KUCAS conformity scheme
